title: Coerce Number to Object
cap_description: Wrap a numeric value in a record
documentation:
## Purpose

Wraps a floating-point number in a record so it can be passed to caps that expect a structured record input.

## Inputs

A numeric (float) value (media type `media:numeric;textable`).

## Outputs

A record containing the numeric value.

## Notes

- Type adapter for the capfab planner.
- Use when connecting a number-producing cap to a record-consuming cap.
